title: ApprovalStrategy
description: How credential applications are reviewed and approved

AUTO.description: Application is approved immediately upon submission without human review
AUTO.use_case: Employee batch issuance, low-risk credentials, pre-verified applicants

MANUAL.description: A human reviewer must explicitly approve or reject the application
MANUAL.use_case: High-assurance credentials, immigration documents, privileged access

RULES_BASED.description: Automated rules engine evaluates the application; routes to MANUAL on rule mismatch
RULES_BASED.use_case: Age verification, professional credentials, jurisdiction-based eligibility

EXTERNAL.description: Approval decision is delegated to an external system via callback. Flow execution pauses at the approval_decision step until the external system POSTs a decision.
EXTERNAL.use_case: Third-party background checks, government identity proofing, enterprise HR systems
